arts.ttl: Leeds United already regret summer transfer decision
arts.sum: Leeds United have a weak squad to cope with the long Championship season. The Whites have one of the smallest squads in the division and their failure to add depth in the summer transfer window could cost them crucial points this season. arts.ttl: Leeds United badly missed out on key signing that ended up moving to Euro club for £5m
arts.sum: Leeds United’s final piece of the puzzle during the summer window was to sign an attacking midfielder, and Roland Sallai looked a great solution, but ended up moving to Galatasaray after the UK window shut. However, the window rolled by with Leeds managing late deals for Ao Tanaka and Isaac Schmidt, but no attacking midfielder whatsoever as Sallai did not join.

arts.ttl: Inside Daniel Farke's speech to Leeds United squad as £13m man makes bold Championship claim
arts.sum: Anyone thinking that Daniel Farke is set to rip up his Leeds United playbook and start again at struggling Cardiff City tomorrow will be in for a rude awakening. Farke has reeled a plethora of statistics off to the squad and fans this week to remind everyone of the "right things" the Whites have done in the early part of the campaign following another summer of huge change at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Farke's reading Leeds United criticism and it pumped key Thorp Arch ploy today
arts.sum: Daniel Farke, it is clear, reads what is being typed and said about his Leeds United team. The media comes armed with what we think are questions supporters want answering and the rest is down to Farke to put the message out he thinks helps the team best.
